ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wifi_scans" (
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Wi-Fi scan */,
  "scan_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scan was performed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the scan took place */,
  "scan_type" TEXT /* Type of scan (e.g., full, incremental) */,
  "scan_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the scan in minutes */,
  "scan_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the scan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wifi_scans_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_points" (
  "ap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access point */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the access point */,
  "essid" TEXT /* ESSID (network name) of the access point */,
  "channel" INTEGER /* Channel on which the signal is broadcast */,
  "frequency_ghz" REAL /* Frequency of the signal in GHz */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the connection */,
  "signal_dbm" INTEGER /* Signal strength in decibels */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scan during which the access point was detected */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the access point */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the access point */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the access point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_points_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES wifi_scans ("scan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client owning the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., office, warehouse) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "service_level" TEXT /* Level of service provided to the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the client company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "ap_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the access point that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., unauthorized AP, signal anomaly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "handled_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was handled */,
  "handler_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the handler who addressed the alert */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_ap_id FOREIGN KEY ("ap_id") REFERENCES access_points ("ap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_handler_id FOREIGN KEY ("handler_id") REFERENCES alert_handlers ("handler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_handlers" (
  "handler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert handler */,
  "handler_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert handler */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the alert handler */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the alert handler (e.g., security analyst, network admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the alert handler */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the alert handler (e.g., wireless security, network architecture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client for whom the report is generated */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scan_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scan to which the statistics belong */,
  "average_quality" REAL /* Average quality of detected access points */,
  "average_signal_dbm" INTEGER /* Average signal strength in decibels */,
  "total_aps_detected" INTEGER /* Total number of access points detected */,
  "failed_scans" INTEGER /* Number of failed scans */,
  "scan_success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the scan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_statistics_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES wifi_scans ("scan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wifi_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Wi-Fi network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the Wi-Fi network */,
  "authorized" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the network is authorized */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client owning the network */,
  "ssid_broadcast" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the SSID is broadcast */,
  "wpa_version" TEXT /* Version of WPA used by the network */,
  "wpa_cipher" TEXT /* Cipher used by the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wifi_networks_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ap_network_mapping" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "ap_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the access point */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Wi-Fi network */,
  "connection_status" TEXT /* Status of the connection (e.g., connected, disconnected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ap_network_mapping_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES wifi_networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ap_network_mapping_ap_id FOREIGN KEY ("ap_id") REFERENCES access_points ("ap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_management" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scanning device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the scanning device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Hardware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scan_device_mapping" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Wi-Fi scan */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scanning device */,
  "scan_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the scan */,
  "scan_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the scan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_device_mapping_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES wifi_scans ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_device_mapping_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_management ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scanning device */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_calibrations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_management ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware update */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scanning device */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the firmware update */,
  "update_file" TEXT /* File path to the firmware update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the firmware update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_updates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_management ("device_id")
)
